visual_enhancers.animations: Use framer-motion for slow, elegant reveals (duration 0.8s, ease out, y: 20 to 0)

components.header: Sticky glassmorphism header with clear navigation and 'Book Appointment' CTA button. z-50
components.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-right button, standard WhatsApp green (#25D366) or gold matching theme, z-50. Include pulse animation.
components.google_rating_badge: Display 4.6 stars, 991 reviews. Use lucide-react star icons (4 full, 1 half). Place in Hero section or Header to build trust.
components.faq_accordion: Use Shadcn UI Accordion. Customize with transparent backgrounds, gold-tinted bottom borders, and elegant typography.
components.collection_card: Image focused cards. Use absolute positioning for text at the bottom. Apply gradient overlay on image hover for readability.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-medium hover:bg-[#F3D56D] transition-colors. Secondary: transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10

hero_banner.description: Elegant woman in red and gold sari - Use as Hero Background

collection_lehengas.description: Woman in red and gold bridal lehenga - Use for Featured Lehengas

collection_sarees.description: Woman in beautiful sari - Use for Sarees Collection

collection_gowns.description: Woman in red and white wedding outfit - Use for Gowns/Suits

collection_accessories.description: Gold colored necklace - Use for Accessories

about_interior.description: Modern clothing store interior - Use in About Us section

about_detail.description: Close up of red and gold dress detail - Use as secondary image in About Us or Services

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' fonts from Google Fonts.
Implement smooth scrolling using Lenis (lenis library).
Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered entrance animations (fade up & slight scale).
Create a purely dark theme application, do not build a light mode toggle. The brand identity is strictly dark and moody.
Do NOT use Inter for headings. Keep the luxury editorial aesthetic.
Build a 'Bento Grid' for the Services/Collections section. Make the Lehenga card prominent (e.g. col-span-8 on md).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs) to support testing.
Embed a generic Google Maps iframe in the Contact section with a dummy Ranchi address.
Ensure image overlays do not exceed 50% opacity in hero so the photography shines, but use gradients to ensure text readability.
For the Testimonials section, create highly styled text reviews that highlight the 4.6 star Google rating.
Implement a dedicated FAQ section using Shadcn Accordion component.

Ensure the entire website is built in single or multiple pages but structured well. Since it's a marketing site, a long scrolling landing page with sections (Home, About, Services, FAQ, Contact) mapped to nav links via IDs is preferred, but separate routes are fine too.
